'''Edan''' was a [[Moff/Legends|moff]] on the [[Imperial Remnant]]'s [[Council of Moffs/Legends|Moff Council]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. He was a skeptic of a proposed truce between the Remnant and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], he took part in the conference where [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] was planning to open peace [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|negotiations]] to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Edan was very concerned about whether the New Republic would stick to such contract or give many prejudices that are spread over the [[Imperial Remnant]]. After Pellaeon managed to convince him, Edan agreed to his proposal at the end of the conference and made peace with the New Republic which ended the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
